scripts.check: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run build && cargo check --manifest-path MMY_SnapMD/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.tauri:dev:image: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- dev -- render-fixtures/image-gallery.md
scripts.tauri:dev:csv: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- dev -- render-fixtures/csv-sales.csv
scripts.tauri:dev:csv:edge: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- dev -- render-fixtures/csv-header-issues.csv
scripts.tauri:dev:yaml: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- dev -- render-fixtures/yaml-config.yaml
scripts.tauri:dev:yaml:edge: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- dev -- render-fixtures/yaml-indent-edge.yml
scripts.tauri:build:portable: npm --prefix MMY_SnapMD run tauri -- build --no-bundle && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/copy-portable.ps1
